name: Caribbean Suprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned black beans and tomatoes.
2. Add the frozen corn, pineapple chunks, ginger, and curry powder to a saucepan.
3. Save some of the drained tomato or pineapple juice in case the mixture gets too thick during heating.
4. Heat everything up together until heated through.
5. Serve over rice or pasta. Feel free to add chopped peppers, water chestnuts, or other vegetables to taste.
